name: Urban Dictionary
summary: Search slang meanings on Urban Dictionary with AI analysis
author: WindFade

options.title: AI Provider
options.desc: Select which AI provider to use for analysis

options.title: Custom Base URL
options.desc: Base URL for custom providers (e.g., https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://api.anthropic.com). Version prefix (/v1, /v4, etc.) is auto-detected. Only required when using Custom providers.

options.title: API Key
options.desc: API key for the selected provider. Required for AI analysis feature.

options.title: OpenAI Model
options.desc: Select which model to use for analysis. For non-OpenAI providers, select 'Custom' and enter the model name below.

options.title: Anthropic Model
options.desc: Select which Anthropic model to use for analysis. Only applies when provider is Anthropic.

options.title: Custom Model Name
options.desc: Enter custom model name when 'Custom' is selected in the model menu above, or when using Custom providers.
